description: You are a DevSecOps engineer at a fintech startup. Refactor the insecure Dockerfile for the payment validation microservice at ~/projects/payment-validator/ into a production-grade 'scratch' image. The resulting image must be a multi-stage build containing a statically compiled Go binary with CGO disabled. The final 'scratch' image must include CA certificates for HTTPS support, run as a non-root user, and be tagged 'payment-validator:secure'.
